## Description
<!-- Briefly describe the changes and what problem this PR solves. Link related issues (e.g. Fix #123) -->

## Type of Change
- [ ] ✨ feat: New feature
- [ ] 🐛 fix: Bug fix
- [ ] 📚 docs: Documentation update
- [ ] ♻️ refactor: Code refactoring (no functional change)
- [ ] ⚡️ perf: Performance optimization
- [ ] 🧪 test: Add / update tests
- [ ] 🤖 ci: CI/workflow changes
- [ ] 🔧 chore: Config / dependency maintenance
- [ ] 🎨 style: Formatting / lint fixes

## Checklist
- [ ] I have followed the project code style (Ruff / Black formatting)
- [ ] I have added or updated documentation (API docs / README) if applicable
- [ ] I have added tests for new functionality
- [ ] All existing tests pass locally
- [ ] No unnecessary debug logs / commented code / Personal Access Tokens are left
- [ ] Public API changes are reflected in `__all__` and `docs/api_reference.md`
- [ ] The PR follows the project commit message convention
